news.summary: In a recent update on May 30, 2025, a correction was made concerning the Board remuneration resolution. The press release, except for this specific detail, remains unaltered. The revised version of the press release is provided below in its entirety. This adjustment was made following the Annual General Meeting in Sivers.
news.headline: Correction made to Sivers Semiconductors AB (publ)'s AGM on May 28, 2025, focused on Board remuneration resolution.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Active Ingredients for Cosmetics - Global Strategic Business Report" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for Active Ingredients for Cosmetics reached a value of US$4.5 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to hit US$6.3 billion by 2030, showing a growth rate of 5.8% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market trends, drivers, and predictions, aiming to assist in making well-informed business choices.
news.headline: Global cosmetics active ingredients market valued at US$4.5B in 2024, projected to reach US$6.3B by 2030 - growth rate of 5.8%.

news.summary: Kimberly Alexander, an educator at Namaqua Elementary School located in Loveland, Colorado, has been recently acknowledged on a national level for her groundbreaking approaches in the classroom that focus on setting high standards and achieving notable student success. This recognition was announced on May 30, 2025, in Loveland, Colorado. Curriculum Associates specifically honored Kimberly for her dedication to implementing innovative teaching methods that have significantly contributed to boosting student achievement in the school.
news.headline: Kimberly Alexander of Namaqua Elementary School in Loveland, CO, recognized by Curriculum Associates for innovative teaching.

news.summary: In Chicago on May 30, 2025, Crowe LLP, a prominent public accounting and consulting firm, revealed the appointment of John Kurkowski as the new Managing Partner of its Audit & Assurance Business Unit starting on July 1, 2025. Kurkowski will be taking over from Wendy Cama.
news.headline: John Kurkowski appointed as Managing Partner of Audit & Assurance at Crowe LLP, effective July 1, 2025. Wendy Cama to be succeeded.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Quiddity Engineering, a civil engineering, planning, and surveying company in Texas, made an announcement regarding the appointment of Steven Martin, PE, as the Senior Project Manager for their North Texas division. Steven will be responsible for overseeing various projects in this region.
news.headline: Quiddity Engineering appoints Steven Martin, PE, as Senior Project Manager in North Texas. New leader to guide projects.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Tracy, California, it was reported that more than 3 million households in the state are experiencing food insecurity. To mark June as National Dairy Month, the California Milk Advisory Board (CMAB) has announced its collaboration with the Raley's Food For Families program for the third consecutive year. The partnership aims to distribute milk and dairy products to those in need.
news.headline: California dairy families and Raley's Food For Families team up to deliver milk & dairy to 3 million food-insecure households.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Quiddity Engineering welcomed Cristina De la Garza, PE, as the new Senior Project Manager at their expanding San Antonio office. With more than two decades of experience in engineering, Cristina brings a wealth of knowledge to her new role. This appointment signifies Quiddity Engineering's commitment to growth and highlights the strategic importance of their San Antonio location.
news.headline: Cristina De la Garza joins Quiddity Engineering in San Antonio as Senior Project Manager with 20+ years of experience.

news.summary: In a recent court case on May 20, 2025, McKool Smith achieved a noteworthy win for Triller Group Inc. after challenging a summary judgment motion from YA II PN, Ltd. in New York State Supreme Court. The motion was filed as an alternative to a complaint under CPLR. This victory underscores the successful defense strategy employed by McKool Smith and highlights the importance of the decision for Triller Group Inc. in the legal battle.
news.headline: McKool Smith prevents summary judgment for Triller Group against YA II PN, Ltd. in NY court on May 20, 2025.

news.summary: Blue Bell, Pennsylvania - On May 30, 2025, Unisys (NYSE: UIS) announced their participation in the East Coast IDEAS Conference to be held at The Westin Times Square in New York City on June 11, 2025. CEO and President, Mike Thomson, is scheduled to present at 8:35 a.m. EDT during the event. Additionally, he will have one-on-one sessions with attendees.
news.headline: Unisys (NYSE: UIS) to participate in East Coast IDEAS Conference on June 11, 2025, CEO Mike Thomson to speak at 8:35am EDT.

news.summary: Lolarchiver, an open-source intelligence platform, provides AI-driven tools capable of quickly creating profiles of YouTube commenters by analyzing their actions. This development has sparked significant concerns regarding privacy and legal implications.
news.headline: AI-powered tool, Lolarchiver, profiles YouTube users with precision, sparking privacy concerns due to their rapidly profiling commenters.

news.summary: WEKA, a company specializing in AI-native data platforms based in Campbell, California, was recently named a Customers' Choice in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer: File and Object Storage Platforms for the second time. This recognition highlights the company's excellence in this field. This acknowledgment comes as WEKA continues to establish itself as a leader, showcasing its commitment to providing top-tier services and solutions.
news.headline: Weka awarded 2025 Customers' Choice in Gartner Peer Insights for File & Object Storage. Recognition for 2nd time.

news.summary: In Chino Hills, California, on May 30, 2025, the California Regional Multiple Listing Service (CRMLS) revealed the debut of Navigator, an AI-driven internal support system created by Lundy, Inc. CRMLS, the leading MLS in the country, implemented this tool organization-wide. This step marks a significant development in their operations.
news.headline: CRMLS partners with Lundy, Inc. to launch Navigator, an AI-powered tool, across all internal departments. (Spaces: 115)

news.summary: The newly acquired Saguaro Reserve III development in Marana, Arizona by Richmond American Homes of Arizona, Inc., a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., offers an array of options for potential residents. The recent purchase includes a total of 90 homesites for future construction.
news.headline: Richmond American Homes buys 90 homesites in Marana to build Saguaro Reserve III community, offering prospective residents new housing options.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a spike in unemployment rates as a result of the ongoing economic downturn, with over 5 million people currently out of work. The study also reveals a 2% decrease in GDP growth for the last quarter, marking a significant setback for the economy. Additionally, the report highlights a 15% rise in inflation, putting further strain on consumers. Experts predict a slow recovery process, with job creation and economic stability being the primary areas of concern.
news.headline: XRP, Solana, and Dogecoin dip as crypto market shrinks by 5%.
AWS Chief: AWS is continuing to expand global cloud capacity aggressively. $AMZN

news.summary: Fiddlehead Resources Corp. announced its unaudited financial and operating results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2025. The company achieved an average corporate production of 1,636 boe/d, with petroleum and natural gas sales totaling $3,975,870 for the quarter. Funds Flow used in Operations was $194,854. The financial and operating highlights compared to the fourth quarter of 2024 include slight growth in average production. Readers are encouraged to review the full unaudited consolidated financial statements and MD&A for a detailed analysis. Selected financial and operating information is available on SEDAR+ and Fiddlehead's website. Key numbers for the first quarter of 2025 include average sales prices for light oil at $91.79/bbl, NGLs at $49.32/bbl, and average realized sales volumes for natural gas at 6,746 Mcf/d. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fiddlehead Resources Corp. reports Q1 2025 results with $3,975,870 in sales and $194,854 Funds Flow used. Production at 1,636 boe/d.

news.summary: Stocks in the U.S. market saw a decline today, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping by more than 100 points on Friday. At the market opening, the Dow decreased by 0.18% to 42,140.55, the NASDAQ fell by 0.57% to 19,066.89, and the S&P 500 also saw a decrease of 0.34% to 5,892.19. Consumer staples shares surged by 0.9%, while energy stocks fell by 0.9% in trading on Friday. The Chicago PMI dropped to 40.5 in May from 44.6 in the previous month. Amidst this, Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: GITS) shares surged by 149% to reach $2.41. More information available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nasdaq drops by 100 points, Chicago PMI dips to 40.5 in May. Dow at 42,140.55, Nasdaq at 19,066.89, S&P 500 at 5,892.19.

news.summary: The stock market experienced a significant increase during a rally on a TACO Tuesday after President Trump postponed new tariffs from the EU. Tesla emerged as a top performer in the latest round of purchases. Investors are eagerly awaiting the upcoming earnings report from Nvidia, which is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the market. The Dow Jones Futures were particularly active following the rally, coinciding with the news of both Nvidia earnings on the horizon and Tesla's strong performance.
news.headline: Stock market gains in TACO Tuesday rally following Trump's tariff delay; Nvidia's earnings on horizon, Tesla a top buy.

news.summary: Seattle's Waterways Cruises has announced the introduction of two fresh cruise offerings and the comeback of a popular one for this summer. Passengers can enjoy distinctive sightseeing and sunset escapades aboard the upgraded Sightseer vessel. The cruises will depart from South Lake Union and Fisherman's Terminal. The news was released on May 30, 2025.
news.headline: Waterways Cruises launches 2025 Summer Cruise Series aboard renovated Sightseer Yacht in Seattle, offering unique experiences.

news.summary: On May 28, 2025, Aether Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATHR), a financial technology firm providing research analytics, revealed plans to join the Russell Microcap® Index. The inclusion is set to take place on June 30 during the 2025 Russell index reconstitution. This move signifies a significant milestone for Aether, with expectations to enhance visibility and potential interest from investors.
news.headline: Aether Holdings to be added to Russell Microcap® Index on June 30, 2025, following reconstitution.

news.summary: Cango Inc., a former car trader, completed the sale of its China business, including car-trading and financing services, in a deal valued at $352 million. The company is focusing on bitcoin mining and has reshuffled its board with new members having financial expertise. This move hints at a possible relocation of its headquarters outside Mainland China, with Singapore, Hong Kong, or the U.S. as potential destinations due to China's ban on cryptocurrency. The company's operations are already outside China, and it plans to file for termination of its status as a 'China Concept Stock' under China's regulatory jurisdiction. This shift indicates Cango's strategic pivot away from its Chinese roots towards regions that support cryptocurrency trading.
news.headline: Cango sells China business, eyes move to Singapore, Hong Kong, or U.S. for $352 million. Board overhaul for bitcoin focus.

news.summary: Investors are closely watching Nvidia's upcoming earnings report as it could significantly impact the market rally. The AI giant, along with similar companies, is approaching key buy points. Okta and Box are already showing early movement in response to their latest results. Tesla also experienced a breakout. This news comes as the Dow Jones index declines just before Nvidia's earnings release.
news.headline: Dow Jones falls as Nvidia earnings await, Okta and Box see movement on results, Tesla holds breakout.

news.summary: In the initial three months of 2025, a revenue of US$1.01 million was generated, driven by strategic funding and an increase in global distribution activities.
news.headline: Beyond Oil's Q1 2025 revenue reaches US$1.01 million, driven by strategic investment and global distribution.

news.summary: On May 28, 2025, in West Chester, Pennsylvania, Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. revealed that their President and CEO, Jayson Rieger, PhD, MBA, will be participating in the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference in New York City. Verrica is a Nasdaq-listed company (Nasdaq: VRCA) focused on dermatology therapeutics. They specialize in developing treatments for skin conditions that necessitate medical interventions. This conference presentation signifies a significant step for the company in showcasing its advancements and strategies in the pharmaceutical sector. The Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference is expected to provide a platform for Verrica to discuss its initiatives and progress with key stakeholders and potential investors.
news.headline: Verrica Pharmaceuticals will participate in Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference in New York City. CEO to present.

news.summary: The company is maintaining regular operations and sales, ensuring the fulfillment of all tickets, loyalty points, travel packages, and customer benefits. They have obtained approval for debtor-in-possession financing to enhance liquidity during the restructuring process. The company has also reiterated its dedication to safely facilitating connections within Brazil for its customers.
news.headline: Azul has received court approvals to proceed with its transformation process alongside strategic partners. Operations continue normally, honoring all tickets and benefits. Secures approval for debtor-in-possession financing for liquidity. Commitment to safely connecting Brazil remains strong.

news.summary: Dublin - A new report on Roaming Tariffs by ResearchAndMarkets.com forecasts substantial growth in the global market. Estimated at a value of US$79.2 billion in 2024, the market is projected to reach US$105.6 billion by 2030, indicating a CAGR of 4.9% during the period from 2024 to 2030. This comprehensive analysis offers insights into market trends and drivers, aiding businesses in making informed decisions. The global roaming tariff market is on a growth trajectory, presenting opportunities for stakeholders.
news.headline: Global Roaming Tariffs market was $79.2 billion in 2024, expected to reach $105.6 billion by 2030, growing at 4.9% CAGR. EU initiates 'Roam Like at Home'.

news.summary: In the latest episode of FOMO HOUR, hosts Farokh, Mando, and Tyler discussed whether the crypto market is on the decline, as well as the emerging trend of Brand Coins. This episode, numbered EP368, offers viewers daily news, updates, and events from both the crypto and macro worlds. Broadcasting live five days a week from Monday to Friday, the show airs from 10:00 AM EST to 11:00 AM EST on YouTube and X platform. For more information and to join the conversation, viewers can visit the provided links. The show covers important topics with key figures in the industry, including Myriad, and can be accessed via podcast or playlist. Stay updated on the latest developments in the crypto sphere by tuning in to FOMO HOUR. #bitcoin #crypto #podcast
news.headline: "Has Crypto Peaked? Join OSF for Brand Coins discussion on FOMO HOUR EP368. Live Mon-Fri 10-11 AM EST on YouTube. #bitcoin #crypto"

news.summary: A prominent supporter of cryptocurrency in Washington is posing significant challenges for the industry.
news.headline: Crypto industry faces challenges as influential supporters like Trump grow, causing concern.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Chalk, the data platform for AI inference, has secured a significant investment as they announced a successful $50 million Series A funding round. This funding has propelled the company to a valuation of $500 million. Leading the round was Felicis, with support from Triatomic Capital and existing investors General Catalyst, Unusual Ventures, and Xfund. Aydin Senkut, the Founder and Managing Partner at Felicis, will also be joining Chalk's board. The freshly acquired capital will be utilized to expedite the development of Chalk's platform, acquire new clients, and expand its engineering team.
news.headline: Chalk raises $50M Series A funding led by Felicis, reaching a $500M valuation. Plans to use funds for platform development and customer growth.

news.summary: A new backstage photo exhibit called "44x44x44" is set to debut at The Atlantis. This exhibit will feature limited edition re-issues and an expansion of the long sold-out coffee table book "9:30 - A Time and a Place." Additionally, a new Instagram account highlighting I.M.P.'s concert photography archives will be launched under the handle @ItsMyPhotoDC. The exhibit marks the 15th anniversary of I.M.P.
news.headline: Seth Hurwitz marks 45th anniversary of 9:30 Club with 44x44x44 exhibit, re-issue of book, and new Instagram account.

This market was assessed at USD 153 million in 2024 and continues to show promising growth.
news.headline: Server Liquid Cold Plate Market experiencing 62.3% CAGR growth, valued at USD 153 Million in year 2024. Key in Internet & Telecom sectors.

news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies player continues to show his unwavering support in the battle against ALS to honor his late uncle. The ALS Association is set to commemorate the 5th annual Lou Gehrig Day, happening on June 2nd at various baseball stadiums nationwide. Lou Gehrig Day serves as a tribute to the iconic baseball player and aims to raise awareness and support for individuals affected by ALS.
news.headline: ALS Association partners with MLB pitcher Aaron Nola to #StrikeOutALS on 5th Annual Lou Gehrig Day on June 2nd.

news.summary: The president of Stripe has acknowledged banks' increasing interest in stablecoins. However, full adoption by banks would necessitate further approval from regulators.
news.headline: Financial institutions keen on stablecoin adoption; Stripe exec sees growing interest. However, regulatory approval still crucial.
